outcome_guardrails.dependency_review: Reviewed all active global skill names, local referenced resources, and the common release workflow; no new duplicate owner or unresolved path conflict was introduced.
outcome_guardrails.negative_trigger: Change an unrelated project artifact that does not modify this skill or its bundled resources.
outcome_guardrails.positive_trigger: Update this skill to fix a verified failure in its documented workflow.
outcome_guardrails.problem_statement: Previous release tracking recorded file changes but did not require evidence that a skill update solves a defined problem without widening or conflicting scope.
outcome_guardrails.success_criteria: Every new release manifest records all four outcome guardrails and rejects missing release evidence.

release.change_summary: Add outcome-focused release guardrails for problem definition, trigger boundaries, dependency review, and risk-based validation.
release.review_notes: Reviewed the immediately preceding release and retained history; this update replaces release-process metadata only and introduces no reintroduced skill behavior.
release.validation: Executed the updated release script and verified manifest hashes, history parsing, and required metadata fields.
